title: Welcome to HomeRail
subtitle: Complete the minimum setup to enable Voice Agent

steps.agentSubtitle: Requires an LLM or a signed-in Codex CLI
steps.asrSubtitle: Requires a model with ASR support
steps.ttsSubtitle: Optional; text mode works without it

runtime.notReady: Manager Agent runtime is not ready. Configure model credentials here, then resolve its local dependencies under Environment check.
runtime.nextAvailable: You can continue to the next step

environmentCheck.description: Verify Manager Agent dependencies; Docker is only needed for container DAGs
environmentCheck.hostNotRequired: This Manager Agent does not require a Git Bash host-shell environment
environmentCheck.gitBashReady: Git Bash host-shell environment is ready
environmentCheck.gitBashRequired: Install Git Bash and verify that the packaged shell contains the Worker runtime files
environmentCheck.dockerShareHomeRail: Allow Docker Desktop to share the HomeRail workspace
environmentCheck.dockerInstallRequired: Docker was not detected. Install and start Docker, then check again.
environmentCheck.dockerStartRequired: Docker is installed but not running. Start Docker, then check again.
environmentCheck.dockerPermissionRequired: The current user cannot access Docker. Grant Docker access, then check again.
environmentCheck.dockerCheckUnavailable: Docker cannot be checked right now. Try again shortly.

form.noPreset: No built-in credentials support {capability}. Switch to Custom / local deployment.
form.edgeTtsHint: Built into HomeRail; no API key required, internet access only
form.discoveringModels: Reading the model list from the service...
form.modelsDetected: Found {count} models from the service; choose one explicitly
form.modelDiscoveryFallback: The service model list is unavailable. Showing the built-in catalog without selecting a model.
form.modelDiscoveryManual: Could not read the model list. Enter the model ID actually exposed by the service.
form.reuseKey: This credential already has a key, which will be reused within the same billing plan
form.voicePlaceholder: Enter a voice supported by the service
form.voiceHint: Voice names are service-specific; leave blank to use the service default
form.localKeyPlaceholder: Local services usually do not require a key
form.checkingMainModel: Checking Anthropic Messages, Chat Completions, and Responses endpoints...
form.checkingAsrEndpoints: Checking realtime and standard ASR endpoints...
form.mainModelReady: Manager Agent model verified and configured with {harness}
form.asrEndpointsUnavailable: The ASR endpoint is unavailable. Standard transcription: {async}; realtime transcription: {realtime}
form.ttsEndpointsUnavailable: The TTS endpoint is unavailable. Speech synthesis: {speech}; streaming synthesis: {stream}
form.modelRuntimeUnavailable: Manager Agent model unavailable. Anthropic Messages: {anthropic}; OpenAI Chat Completions: {openai}; OpenAI Responses: {responses}
form.modelRuntimeDetectionRequired: Runtime detection is required before saving the Manager Agent model
form.mainModelPlaceholder: Enter the model ID exposed by the service
form.modelPlaceholder: Choose a detected model or enter the actual model ID
form.llmBaseHint: Enter the service root or a /v1 URL. The backend tries versioned and unversioned Messages, Chat Completions, and Responses endpoints
form.llmModelHint: No model is prefilled; the backend sends a minimal request with this exact model ID
form.asrBaseHint: Enter a URL including /v1; realtime and standard transcription endpoints are tested before saving
form.modelHint: Model ID sent by the backend
